title: The Samurai and the Minks
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the samurai and the minks within the Dog and Cat Remember Oden storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: You release your gas... and only fight weakened warriors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You gutless cowards dare call yourselves soldiers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: UWA4!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn! This guy's trying to tear the chains holding him to that crucifix!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Did the gas have any effect on him!? Make it so he can't use those arms of his!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah! Take these arms of mine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Some of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you've got time to point 'em at this country's people,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Point them at me instead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Those Twigs you call Spears!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll take them all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Shame that you got away with only one leg missing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'd not have minded if you just died!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This country only needs one ruler!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Stop, please! Both of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: SHIKK

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Right you are! Let's get rid of the other one right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll take that head of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: dog and cat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: UWAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: STOO- OOP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You idiot! What are you doing, screaming like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Isn't that...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: A Samurai !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now look what you've done! They've spotted us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Run for it! Kinemon! Run! They'll make a chew toy out of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oi! Unhand me! Please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What are you two doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Kanjuro! Momo! Get back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Run, both of you! Now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Neko- Manushi! Inuarashi! Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: These guys don't bear any ill will toward--

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Ye of the country of you! I am a retainer of the Kougetsu family of the Wano Kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My name is Kinemon!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: We have come in search of a warrior of our country, a comrade named Raizo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Has he come here, by chance!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Holy shit! Did you not hear anything we just said?!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: These people almost died cause that Raizo Guy wasn't here!

summary: The Samurai and the Minks: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
